tutorials.title: Section 1: Start Guide
tutorials.description: Use this orientation section to choose the redesigned guide route you need, then pull in only the background pages that answer a real blocker.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: WMS lifecycle, Quality Assurance, and publishing flow
tutorials.description: Explains workshop statuses, approval handoffs, stakeholder Quality Assurance, and publishing flow before authors begin the hands-on workflow.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: GitHub foundations
tutorials.description: Explains the Oracle LiveLabs GitHub model, including repositories, forks, clones, and the standard authoring flow before authors start execution labs.
